name: Minimum Safe Clinic Framework v1.0
description: A lightweight compliance framework for free and charitable clinics.

rules.name: Nonprofit Status
rules.description: Clinic must verify its 501(c)(3) or equivalent nonprofit status.

rules.name: Board of Directors
rules.description: Clinic must have an active Board of Directors with recorded meetings.

rules.name: FTCA Readiness
rules.description: Clinic should track readiness for Federal Tort Claims Act coverage.

rules.name: License Verification
rules.description: All active clinicians must have verified, non-expired licenses.

rules.name: Scope of Practice
rules.description: Scope of practice must be defined for all provider types.

rules.name: Access Controls
rules.description: Patient data access must be restricted to authorized personnel.

rules.name: Audit Logging
rules.description: System must log who accessed patient records.

rules.name: Dispensing Authorization
rules.description: If dispensing, clinic must have appropriate pharmacy license/permit.

rules.name: Storage Security
rules.description: Medications must be stored securely (double-lock for controlled substances).

rules.name: Incident Log
rules.description: Mechanism to record adverse events must exist.

rules.name: Emergency Contacts
rules.description: Emergency contact list must be up to date and accessible.
